zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Raleigh於1090年出生在英國英格蘭戴文法爾時，他的父親Walter De Raleigh25歲，母親Beatrice de Malet20歲。他於1144年與Annie Blofield在英國英格蘭戴文法爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1179年在英國薩默塞特皮爾頓享年89歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Raleigh was born in 1090, in Farleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter De Raleigh, was 25 and his mother, Beatrice de Malet, was 20. He married Annie Blofield in 1144, in Farleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1179, in Pilton, Somerset, England, at the age of 89.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Raleigh(이)가 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 패를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Raleigh(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Malet(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 패를리에서 Annie Blofield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1179년 영국 서머세트 피턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Raleigh родился в 1090 г. в местности фарлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter De Raleigh было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Malet, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Annie Blofield в 1144 г. в местности фарлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1179 г. в местности пилтон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 89 лет.
